user.title: Dashboard Copy
user.description: This enables the **Dashboard Copy** action (service `dashboard_copy.copy`). After setup, run it from Developer Tools → Actions, or from any automation, to duplicate a dashboard.

abort.single_instance_allowed: Already set up. Only a single instance is needed — use the `dashboard_copy.copy` action to duplicate dashboards.

copy.name: Copy dashboard
copy.description: Duplicate an existing Lovelace dashboard into a new one.

source.name: Source dashboard
source.description: URL path of the dashboard to copy. Use "lovelace" for the default Overview dashboard.

new_title.name: New title
new_title.description: Title shown in the sidebar for the new dashboard.

new_url_path.name: New URL path
new_url_path.description: Optional. Auto-derived from the title if left blank. Must be a lowercase slug with at least one hyphen.

update_links.name: Rewrite navigation links
update_links.description: Rewrite navigation_path values pointing at the source dashboard so the copy is self-contained.
